use_cases: Social media story viewing with swipe navigation between images and videos
E-commerce product showcases with sequential media presentations
Portfolio or project updates with timestamp-based content delivery
News or feed updates displayed in story format with progress tracking
ai_summary: A full-featured story viewer component inspired by Instagram/Snapchat stories, supporting both image and video media types with swipe navigation, circular progress segments indicating viewed content, timestamp display, and smooth enter/exit animations via Framer Motion. Includes playback controls for video stories and automatic advancement with configurable durations.
